packs.name: bash-permission-denied
packs.description:
Bash or shell command fails with "Permission denied" error.
Usually occurs when running scripts or accessing files without execute/read permissions.

packs.name: django-circular-dependency
packs.description: Django app fails with "ImportError: circular import" during startup.

packs.name: django-migration-state
packs.description:
Django migrations are out of sync with database state.
"table already exists", "no such table", or "applied migrations" errors.

packs.name: django-null-pointer
packs.description:
Django template or view fails with "NoneType is not iterable" or
"'NoneType' object has no attribute".

packs.name: django-schema-drift
packs.description:
Django model and database schema are out of sync.
"no such column" or "table has no column" errors after adding fields.

packs.name: docker-no-space
packs.description:
Docker fails with "no space left on device" or "ENOSPC" error
when building images or running containers.

packs.name: git-merge-conflict
packs.description:
Git merge or rebase fails due to conflicting changes.
"CONFLICT (content): merge conflict in <file>".

packs.name: pytest-flaky-test
packs.description:
Pytest test passes sometimes and fails other times without code changes.
Tests using network, time-based assertions, or shared state are flaky.

packs.name: python-import-cycle
packs.description:
Python module fails with "ImportError: circular import" or
"cannot import name 'X' from 'Y'".

packs.name: python-missing-dependency
packs.description:
Python fails with "ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'X'" or
"ImportError: No module named 'X'".
